I found the specific details for the Silver Rewards Card referral program:

**Qualifying Spend Requirement:**
- Your friend needs to spend **at least $750** within **60 days** of account opening

**Your Referral Bonus:**
- Once your friend meets the $750 spending requirement, you'll receive a **$75 referral bonus**
- The bonus typically posts within **one to two billing cycles** after the requirement is met

**Additional Details:**
- You can earn up to 7 referral bonuses per calendar year
- Make sure your friend activates their card promptly and uses it for regular purchases to meet the threshold

Since your referral is dated November 13, 2025, your friend has until approximately mid-January 2026 to meet the $750 spending requirement. You can track their progress through your Rho-Bank mobile app or online banking portal.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
